category_sources: official GitHub README describes Enchive as a tool to encrypt files for long-term archival.
display_name_sources: official GitHub README title uses Enchive.
docs_sources: official GitHub README is a documentation surface and links to the official enchive(1) manual page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/skeeto/enchive, so repo is not re-determined.
tags_sources: official GitHub README describes encrypted archives, keygen/archive/extract commands, Curve25519, ChaCha8, and HMAC-SHA256.
